titles.title: Take me out of the dark

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Just what is it in me? Sometimes, I just don't know What keeps me in your love? Why you never let me go And though You're in me now I fall and hurt You still

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: My Lord, please show me how To know just how You feel You have forgiven me Too many times, it seems I feel I'm not what You might call A worthy Christian after all

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And though I love You so Temptation finds its way to me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Teach me to trust in You with all of my heart To lean not on my own understanding Guess I just forget You won't give me what I can't bear Take me out of the dark, my Lord I don't wanna be there Ooh, ooh, ooh, ah, ah, ah

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You've never left my side You gave your hand to me To hold you, oh Jesus I'm no longer in the cold And yet, I leave You there When I feel satisfied I'd like to thank You everyday Not only when I feel that way I've never known a man who'd give His life For sinners like me And yet because He loves us so He's promised us eternity And we can have that promise and be His If we have faith and just believe

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Teach us to trust in You with all of our heart To lean not on our own understanding We just forget You won't give us what we can't bear Take us out of the dark, my Lord 'Cause we don't want to be alone Take us out of the dark, my Lord We don't wanna be there Yeah, my Lord

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Trust in You with all of our heart And lean not on our own understanding 'Cause we just forget You won't give us what we can't bear Just, take us out of the dark, my Lord 'Cause we don't want to be alone Take us out of the dark, my Lord We don't wanna be there
